instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Nothing important is being displayed on the computer monitor." signSize=1 visible=0 image_xscale=2.5 y+=32
stringToShow=">>Log<<#We hid a Heart Piece around here.#>>End Log<<" signSize=2 visible=0 image_xscale=2.5 y+=32

type=0 sprite_index=sWarmasterA_Idle image_xscale=1.25 image_yscale=1.25 image_speed=0.15
if global.gameProgress>=4270 {instance_destroy()}

type=4 moveStep=pi/2 sprite_index=sHex_A_Idle image_xscale=-1
if global.gameProgress>=4270 {instance_destroy()}
